---
name: Feature request (Markdown)
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability for Amplyx
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem or opportunity

What pain point are you trying to solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you want Amplyx to do.

## Alternatives considered

What workarounds or alternatives did you try?

## Use case and impact

Who benefits, and how often would this be used?

## Additional context

Add examples, mockups, or links if useful.

> Privacy reminder: This repo is public. Do not include personal data, passwords, or tokens.
